title: T-023 — Activation 3-step wizard page + state machine (D-MS-14, ms_activation_wizard) MS-010
prompt:
# T-023 — Activation 3-step wizard page

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §13.5 D-MS-14, §11.5 V-MS-18/V-MS-19, §10C MS-010
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx:495-652 (ms_activation_wizard)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_activation_wizard

## Goal
Dedicated full-page wizard at /multi-site/activate that takes the org through Phase D-MS-14 state machine (inactive → wizard_in_progress → dual_run → activated). Resumable via activation_wizard_draft. Final 'Activate' button opens MODAL-ACTIVATION-CONFIRM that triggers T-030 backfill job.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/page.tsx (RSC) — guards: if org.multi_site_state ∉ {inactive, wizard_in_progress}, redirect to /multi-site/sites; if user role != admin, 403.
2. ActivationWizardClient (client) — 3 steps: Create Sites (useFieldArray site rows), Assign Users (users×sites matrix), Backfill & Review (preview counts from backfillPreview Server Action + 3 confirm checkboxes).
3. Server Actions:
   - saveWizardDraft({step, payload}) → upserts activation_wizard_draft row keyed (org_id, draft_kind='multi_site_activation').
   - previewBackfill() → returns row counts per the 20 §9.8 site-scoped operational tables that will be stamped with default_site_id.
   - startActivation() → V-MS-18 asserts 3 steps complete; V-MS-19 backfill-coverage 100% assertion before enabling; transitions org_settings.multi_site_state to 'dual_run'.
4. Tests: V-MS-18 enforcement (cannot Activate without all 3 steps), V-MS-19 (backfill preview returns counts for all 20 tables), wizard guard redirects, draft resumability.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/_components/activation-wizard-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/_actions/save-wizard-draft.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/_actions/preview-backfill.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/_actions/start-activation.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0051_activation_wizard_draft.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/activate/_components/__tests__/activation-wizard.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the page renders, when compared to admin-screens.jsx:495-652 (ms_activation_wizard), then 3 steps + per-step layout (site rows useFieldArray, users×sites matrix, backfill preview) match — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given org.multi_site_state='activated', when GET /multi-site/activate, then redirect to /multi-site/sites (cannot re-activate).
3. Given user role != admin, when GET /multi-site/activate, then 403.
4. Given previewBackfill is invoked, when the response settles, then it returns an object with row counts keyed by all 20 site-scoped §9.8 tables (V-MS-19 coverage check).
5. Given startActivation is called with only 2 steps complete, when it runs, then BackfillStepsIncomplete (V-MS-18) is thrown.
6. Given startActivation succeeds, when org_settings is re-queried, then multi_site_state='dual_run' and an audit_events row 'multisite_activation_started' is written.
7. Given saveWizardDraft is called twice with different step payloads, when activation_wizard_draft is queried, then exactly one row exists per (org_id, draft_kind), updated_at advanced.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + redirect + 403 + V-MS-19 preview + V-MS-18 enforcement + state transition + draft resumability before page exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run activation-wizard' + Playwright activation-wizard.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx:495-652 (ms_activation_wizard).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not allow startActivation if any of 3 steps incomplete (V-MS-18).
- Do not couple backfill to actual ALTER TABLE here — preview only; T-030 owns the migration.
- Do not let non-admin reach the page (Server-side guard).
- Do not commit state transition without writing audit_events row.
